items.claim: BSD is the heaviest fighter on top in the UFC.
items.quote: he is probably the heaviest on top of anyone in the UFC

items.claim: BSD has a very effective clinch game using knees and elbows to break opponents.
items.quote: He has a very good clinch game with knees and elbows and kind of just uses that to break his opponents over time.

items.claim: BSD's game planning has improved significantly under Nicholas Aught.
items.quote: His game planning has improved significantly with Nicholas Aught.

items.claim: Patty lacks the footwork to circle away from the fence.
items.quote: Patty doesn't have good footwork. We're not talking about like, oh, Patty has great striking on the outside and he's going to circle well... Like, no. Patty's going to back up straight to the fence

items.claim: Max Holloway is the most prolific volume striker in UFC history.
items.quote: Holloway is, of course, the statistically most prolific volume striker in UFC history.

items.claim: Max Holloway has a predictable habit of circling in the same direction.
items.quote: he does tend to use the same guard every single time and circle in the predictable direction every single time.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's cardio is a major concern due to his long layoff.
items.quote: the biggest issue is his cardio. Uh especially after so much time off

items.claim: Max Holloway's durability has declined compared to his past performance.
items.quote: especially now that his durability isn't what it used to be.
